    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom miniq.db.models import ALLOWED_TRANSITIONS\nfrom miniq.enums import JobState\n\n\ndef is_transition_allowed(old_state: JobState, new_state: JobState) -> bool:\n    return new_state in ALLOWED_TRANSITIONS[old_state]\n\n\ndef require_transition(old_state: JobState, new_state: JobState) -> None:\n    if not is_transition_allowed(old_state, new_state):\n        msg = f\"invalid job state transition: {old_state} -> {new_state}\"\n        raise ValueError(msg)\n\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "REDACTED",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport json\nimport logging\nimport sys\nfrom datetime import UTC, datetime\nfrom typing import Any\n\n\nLOG_FIELDS = (\n    \"service\",\n    \"job_id\",\n    \"stream_id\",\n    \"consumer\",\n    \"attempt\",\n    \"state\",\n    \"schedule_id\",\n    \"queue\",\n)\n\n\nclass JsonLogFormatter(logging.Formatter):\n    def format(self, record: logging.LogRecord) -> str:\n        payload: dict[str, Any] = {\n            \"timestamp\": datetime.fromtimestamp(record.created, tz=REDACTED,\n            \"level\": record.levelname,\n            \"logger\": record.name,\n            \"message\": record.getMessage(),\n        }\n        for field in LOG_FIELDS:\n            value = getattr(record, field, None)\n            if value is not None:\n                payload[field] = value\n        if record.exc_info:\n            payload[\"exc_info\"] = self.formatException(record.exc_info)\n        return json.dumps(payload, separators=REDACTED\",\", \":\"), sort_keys=REDACTED configure_logging(*, service: str, level: str) -> None:\n    handler = logging.StreamHandler(stream=REDACTED    handler.setFormatter(JsonLogFormatter())\n    root = logging.getLogger()\n    root.handlers.clear()\n    root.addHandler(handler)\n    root.setLevel(level.upper())\n    root.propagate = False\n    logging.LoggerAdapter(logging.getLogger(service), {\"service\": service})\n\n\ndef get_logger(name: str, *, service: str) -> logging.LoggerAdapter[logging.Logger]:\n    return logging.LoggerAdapter(logging.getLogger(name), {\"service\": service})\n\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "REDACTED",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom pathlib import Path\n\nfrom sqlalchemy import event, text\nfrom sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncEngine, AsyncSession, async_sessionmaker, create_async_engine\n\nfrom miniq.db.models import Base\n\n\ndef create_engine(database_url: str) -> AsyncEngine:\n    engine = create_async_engine(database_url, future=True, pool_pre_ping=REDACTED    @event.listens_for(engine.sync_engine, \"connect\")\n    def _set_sqlite_pragmas(dbapi_connection: object, _connection_record: object) -> None:\n        cursor = dbapi_connection.cursor()\n        cursor.execute(\"PRAGMA journal_mode=REDACTED;\")\n        cursor.execute(\"PRAGMA synchronous=REDACTED;\")\n        cursor.execute(\"PRAGMA foreign_keys=REDACTED;\")\n        cursor.execute(\"PRAGMA busy_timeout=REDACTED;\")\n        cursor.close()\n\n    return engine\n\n\ndef create_session_factory(engine: AsyncEngine) -> async_sessionmaker[AsyncSession]:\n    return async_sessionmaker(engine, expire_on_commit=False, autoflush=REDACTED def init_db(engine: AsyncEngine) -> None:\n    async with engine.begin() as conn:\n        await conn.run_sync(Base.metadata.create_all)\n        await conn.execute(text(\"PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE);\"))\n\n\nasync def ensure_db_parent(path: Path) -> None:\n    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=REDACTED"
        },
        "2:LEN": "REDACTED",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },

        },

          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom datetime import datetime\nfrom typing import Any\n\nfrom sqlalchemy import JSON, Boolean, DateTime, ForeignKey, Index, Integer, String, Text, UniqueConstraint\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import DeclarativeBase, Mapped, mapped_column, relationship\n\nfrom miniq.enums import JobState\nfrom miniq.utils import utc_now\n\n\nclass Base(DeclarativeBase):\n    pass\n\n\nclass Job(Base):\n    __tablename__ = \"jobs\"\n    __table_args__ = (\n        Index(\n            \"ix_jobs_idempotency_active\",\n            \"idempotency_key\",\n            unique=True,\n            sqlite_where=REDACTED                mapped_column(String, nullable=REDACTED  # type: ignore[arg-type]\n            ),  # placeholder replaced below\n        ),\n    )\n\n    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), primary_key=REDACTED    type: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(128), nullable=False, index=REDACTED    queue: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(64), nullable=False, index=REDACTED    payload: Mapped[dict[str, Any]] = mapped_column(JSON, nullable=REDACTED    state: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(16), nullable=False, index=REDACTED    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=REDACTED, default=REDACTED, nullable=REDACTED    updated_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=REDACTED, default=REDACTED, nullable=REDACTED    idempotency_key: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=REDACTED    attempts: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, default=REDACTED, nullable=REDACTED    max_attempts: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, default=REDACTED, nullable=REDACTED    next_run_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=REDACTED, nullable=True, index=REDACTED    schedule: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=REDACTED    last_error: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=REDACTED    result: Mapped[dict[str, Any] | None] = mapped_column(JSON, nullable=REDACTED    cancel_requested: Mapped[bool] = mapped_column(Boolean, default=False, nullable=REDACTED    broker_enqueued_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=REDACTED, nullable=True, index=REDACTED    last_stream_id: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(64), nullable=REDACTED    schedule_id: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=True, index=REDACTED    finished_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=REDACTED, nullable=REDACTED    dlq_published_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=REDACTED, nullable=REDACTED    events: Mapped[list[\"JobEvent\"]] = relationship(back_populates=REDACTED\"job\", cascade=REDACTED\"all, delete-orphan\")\n\n\nclass JobEvent(Base):\n    __tablename__ = \"job_events\"\n\n    id: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=REDACTED    job_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(ForeignKey(\"jobs.id\", ondelete=REDACTED\"CASCADE\"), index=REDACTED    ts: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=REDACTED, default=REDACTED, nullable=False, index=REDACTED    old_state: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(16), nullable=REDACTED    new_state: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(16), nullable=REDACTED    message: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=REDACTED    metadata: Mapped[dict[str, Any] | None] = mapped_column(JSON, nullable=REDACTED    job: Mapped[Job] = relationship(back_populates=REDACTED\"events\")\n\n\nclass ScheduleTick(Base):\n    __tablename__ = \"schedule_ticks\"\n    __table_args__ = (UniqueConstraint(\"schedule_id\", \"planned_time\", name=REDACTED\"uq_schedule_tick\"),)\n\n    id: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=REDACTED    schedule_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=False, index=REDACTED    planned_time: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=REDACTED, nullable=False, index=REDACTED    job_id: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(36), ForeignKey(\"jobs.id\", ondelete=REDACTED\"SET NULL\"), nullable=REDACTED    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=REDACTED, default=REDACTED, nullable=REDACTED dict[JobState, set[JobState]] = {\n    JobState.QUEUED: {JobState.RUNNING, JobState.CANCELED},\n    JobState.RUNNING: {JobState.SUCCEEDED, JobState.FAILED, JobState.CANCELED, JobState.DEAD},\n    JobState.FAILED: {JobState.QUEUED},\n    JobState.DEAD: {JobState.QUEUED},\n    JobState.SUCCEEDED: set(),\n    JobState.CANCELED: set(),\n}\n\n"

CTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522.%2522%257D%255D%252C%25224%253AVARINT%2522%253A1%257D%252C%257B%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522from%2B__future__%2Bimport%2Bannotations%255Cn%255Cnimport%2Bjson%255Cnimport%2Blogging%255Cnimport%2Bsys%255Cnfrom%2Bdatetime%2Bimport%2BUTC%252C%2Bdatetime%255Cnfrom%2Btyping%2Bimport%2BAny%255Cn%255Cn%255CnLOG_FIELDS%2B%253D%2B%2528%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%255C%2522service%255C%2522%252C%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%255C%2522job_id%255C%2522%252C%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%255C%2522stream_id%255C%2522%252C%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%255C%2522consumer%255C%2522%252C%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%255C%2522attempt%255C%2522%252C%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%255C%2522state%255C%2522%252C%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%255C%2522schedule_id%255C%2522%252C%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%255C%2522queue%255C%2522%252C%255Cn%2529%255Cn%255Cn%255Cnclass%2BJsonLogFormatter%2528logging.Formatter%2529%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bdef%2Bformat%2528self%252C%2Brecord%253A%2Blogging.LogRecord%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2Bstr%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bpayload%253A%2Bdict%255Bstr%252C%2BAny%255D%2B%253D%2B%257B%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%255C%2522timestamp%255C%2522%253A%2Bdatetime.fromtimestamp%2528record.created%252C%2Btz%253DREDACTED%252C%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%255C%2522level%255C%2522%253A%2Brecord.levelname%252C%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%255C%2522logger%255C%2522%253A%2Brecord.name%252C%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%255C%2522message%255C%2522%253A%2Brecord.getMessage%2528%2529%252C%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%257D%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bfor%2Bfield%2Bin%2BLOG_FIELDS%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bvalue%2B%253D%2Bgetattr%2528record%252C%2Bfield%252C%2BNone%2529%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bif%2Bvalue%2Bis%2Bnot%2BNone%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bpayload%255Bfield%255D%2B%253D%2Bvalue%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bif%2Brecord.exc_info%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bpayload%255B%255C%2522exc_info%255C%2522%255D%2B%253D%2Bself.formatException%2528record.exc_info%2529%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Breturn%2Bjson.dumps%2528payload%252C%2Bseparators%253DREDACTED%2522%252C%255C%2522%252C%2B%255C%2522%253A%255C%2522%2529%252C%2Bsort_keys%253DREDACTED%2Bconfigure_logging%2528%252A%252C%2Bservice%253A%2Bstr%252C%2Blevel%253A%2Bstr%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2BNone%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bhandler%2B%253D%2Blogging.StreamHandler%2528stream%253DREDACTED%2B%2B%2B%2Bhandler.setFormatter%2528JsonLogFormatter%2528%2529%2529%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Broot%2B%253D%2Blogging.getLogger%2528%2529%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Broot.handlers.clear%2528%2529%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Broot.addHandler%2528handler%2529%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Broot.setLevel%2528level.upper%2528%2529%2529%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Broot.propagate%2B%253D%2BFalse%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Blogging.LoggerAdapter%2528logging.getLogger%2528service%2529%252C%2B%257B%255C%2522service%255C%2522%253A%2Bservice%257D%2529%255Cn%255Cn%255Cndef%2Bget_logger%2528name%253A%2Bstr%252C%2B%252A%252C%2Bservice%253A%2Bstr%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2Blogging.LoggerAdapter%255Blogging.Logger%255D%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Breturn%2Blogging.LoggerAdapter%2528logging.getLogger%2528name%2529%252C%2B%257B%255C%2522service%255C%2522%253A%2Bservice%257D%2529%255Cn%255Cn%2522%257D%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%255B%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522.%2522%257D%255D%252C%25224%253AVARINT%2522%253A1%257D%252C%257B%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522from%2B__future__%2Bimport%2Bannotations%255Cn%255Cnfrom%2Bpathlib%2Bimport%2BPath%255Cn%255Cnfrom%2Bsqlalchemy%2Bimport%2Bevent%252C%2Btext%255Cnfrom%2Bsqlalchemy.ext.asyncio%2Bimport%2BAsyncEngine%252C%2BAsyncSession%252C%2Basync_sessionmaker%252C%2Bcreate_async_engine%255Cn%255Cnfrom%2Bminiq.db.models%2Bimport%2BBase%255Cn%255Cn%255Cndef%2Bcreate_engine%2528database_url%253A%2Bstr%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2BAsyncEngine%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bengine%2B%253D%2Bcreate_async_engine%2528database_url%252C%2Bfuture%253DTrue%252C%2Bpool_pre_ping%253DREDACTED%2B%2B%2B%2B%2540event.listens_for%2528engine.sync_engine%252C%2B%255C%2522connect%255C%2522%2529%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bdef%2B_set_sqlite_pragmas%2528dbapi_connection%253A%2Bobject%252C%2B_connection_record%253A%2Bobject%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2BNone%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bcursor%2B%253D%2Bdbapi_connection.cursor%2528%2529%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bcursor.execute%2528%255C%2522PRAGMA%2Bjournal_mode%253DREDACTED%253B%255C%2522%2529%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bcursor.execute%2528%255C%2522PRAGMA%2Bsynchronous%253DREDACTED%253B%255C%2522%2529%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bcursor.execute%2528%255C%2522PRAGMA%2Bforeign_keys%253DREDACTED%253B%255C%2522%2529%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bcursor.execute%2528%255C%2522PRAGMA%2Bbusy_timeout%253DREDACTED%253B%255C%2522%2529%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bcursor.close%2528%2529%255Cn%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Breturn%2Bengine%255Cn%255Cn%255Cndef%2Bcreate_session_factory%2528engine%253A%2BAsyncEngine%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2Basync_sessionmaker%255BAsyncSession%255D%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Breturn%2Basync_sessionmaker%2528engine%252C%2Bexpire_on_commit%253DFalse%252C%2Bautoflush%253DREDACTED%2Bdef%2Binit_db%2528engine%253A%2BAsyncEngine%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2BNone%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Basync%2Bwith%2Bengine.begin%2528%2529%2Bas%2Bconn%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bawait%2Bconn.run_sync%2528Base.metadata.create_all%2529%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bawait%2Bconn.execute%2528text%2528%255C%2522PRAGMA%2Bwal_checkpoint%2528TRUNCATE%2529%253B%255C%2522%2529%2529%255Cn%255Cn%255Cnasync%2Bdef%2Bensure_db_parent%2528path%253A%2BPath%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2BNone%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bpath.parent.mkdir%2528parents%253DTrue%252C%2Bexist_ok%253DREDACTED%2522%257D%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%255B%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522.%2522%257D%255D%252C%25224%253AVARINT%2522%253A1%257D%252C%257B%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522from%2B__future__%2Bimport%2Bannotations%255Cn%255Cnfrom%2Bdatetime%2Bimport%2Bdatetime%255Cnfrom%2Btyping%2Bimport%2BAny%255Cn%255Cnfrom%2Bsqlalchemy%2Bimport%2BJSON%252C%2BBoolean%252C%2BDateTime%252C%2BForeignKey%252C%2BIndex%252C%2BInteger%252C%2BString%252C%2BText%252C%2BUniqueConstraint%255Cnfrom%2Bsqlalchemy.orm%2Bimport%2BDeclarativeBase%252C%2BMapped%252C%2Bmapped_column%252C%2Brelationship%255Cn%255Cnfrom%2Bminiq.enums%2Bimport%2BJobState%255Cnfrom%2Bminiq.utils%2Bimport%2Butc_now%255Cn%255Cn%255Cnclass%2BBase%2528DeclarativeBase%2529%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bpass%255Cn%255Cn%255Cnclass%2BJob%2528Base%2529%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B__tablename__%2B%253D%2B%255C%2522jobs%255C%2522%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B__table_args__%2B%253D%2B%2528%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2BIndex%2528%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%255C%2522ix_jobs_idempotency_active%255C%2522%252C%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%255C%2522idempotency_key%255C%2522%252C%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bunique%253DTrue%252C%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bsqlite_where%253DREDACTED%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bmapped_column%2528String%252C%2Bnullable%253DREDACTED%2B%2B%2523%2Btype%253A%2Bignore%255Barg-type%255D%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2529%252C%2B%2B%2523%2Bplaceholder%2Breplaced%2Bbelow%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2529%252C%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2529%255Cn%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bid%253A%2BMapped%255Bstr%255D%2B%253D%2Bmapped_column%2528String%252836%2529%252C%2Bprimary_key%253DREDACTED%2B%2B%2B%2Btype%253A%2BMapped%255Bstr%255D%2B%253D%2Bmapped_column%2528String%2528128%2529%252C%2Bnullable%253DFalse%252C%2Bindex%253DREDACTED%2B%2B%2B%2Bqueue%253A%2BMapped%255Bstr%255D%2B%253D%2Bmapped_column%2528String%252864%2529%252C%2Bnullable%253DFalse%252C%2Bindex%253DREDACTED%2B%2B%2B%2Bpayload%253A%2BMapped%255Bdict%255Bstr%252C%2BAny%255D%255D%2B%253D%2Bmapped_column%2528JSON%252C%2Bnullable%253DREDACTED%2B%2B%2B%2Bstate%253A%2BMapped%255Bstr%255D%2B%253D%2Bmapped_column%2528String%252816%2529%252C%2Bnullable%253DFalse%252C%2Bindex%253DREDACTED%2B%2B%2B%2Bcreated_at%253A%2BMapped%255Bdatetime%255D%2B%253D%2Bmapped_column%2528DateTime%2528timezone%253DREDACTED%252C%2Bdefault%253DREDACTED%252C%2Bnullable%253DREDACTED%2B%2B%2B%2Bupdated_at%253A%2BMapped%255Bdatetime%255D%2B%253D%2Bmapped_column%2528DateTime%2528timezone%253DREDACTED%252C%2Bdefault%253DREDACTED%252C%2Bnullable%253DREDACTED%2B%2B%2B%2Bidempotency_key%253A%2BMapped%255Bstr%2B%257C%2BNone%255D%2B%253D%2Bmapped_column%2528String%2528255%2529%252C%2Bnullable%253DREDACTED%2B%2B%2B%2Battempts%253A%2BMapped%255Bint%255D%2B%253D%2Bmapped_column%2528Integer%252C%2Bdefault%253DREDACTED%252C%2Bnullable%253DREDACTED%2B%2B%2B%2Bmax_attempts%253A%2BMapped%255Bint%255D%2B%253D%2Bmapped_column%2528Integer%252C%2Bdefault%253DREDACTED%252C%2Bnullable%253DREDACTED%2B%2B%2B%2Bnext_run_at%253A%2BMapped%255Bdatetime%2B%257C%2BNone%255D%2B%253D%2Bmapped_column%2528DateTime%2528timezone%253DREDACTED%252C%2Bnullable%253DTrue%252C%2Bindex%253DREDACTED%2B%2B%2B%2Bschedule%253A%2BMapped%255Bstr%2B%257C%2BNone%255D%2B%253D%2Bmapped_column%2528String%2528255%2529%252C%2Bnullable%253DREDACTED%2B%2B%2B%2Blast_error%253A%2BMapped%255Bstr%2B%257C%2BNone%255D%2B%253D%2Bmapped_column%2528Text%252C%2Bnullable%253DREDACTED%2B%2B%2B%2Bresult%253A%2BMapped%255Bdict%255Bstr%252C%2BAny%255D%2B%257C%2BNone%255D%2B%253D%2Bmapped_column%2528JSON%252C%2Bnullable%253DREDACTED%2B%2B%2B%2Bcancel_requested%253A%2BMapped%255Bbool%255D%2B%253D%2Bmapped_column%2528Boolean%252C%2Bdefault%253DFalse%252C%2Bnullable%253DREDACTED%2B%2B%2B%2Bbroker_enqueued_at%253A%2BMapped%255Bdatetime%2B%257C%2BNone%255D%2B%253D%2Bmapped_column%2528DateTime%2528timezone%253DREDACTED%252C%2Bnullable%253DTrue%252C%2Bindex%253DREDACTED%2B%2B%2B%2Blast_stream_id%253A%2BMapped%255Bstr%2B%257C%2BNone%255D%2B%253D%2Bmapped_column%2528String%252864%2529%252C%2Bnullable%253DREDACTED%2B%2B%2B%2Bschedule_id%253A%2BMapped%255Bstr%2B%257C%2BNone%255D%2B%253D%2Bmapped_column%2528String%2528255%2529%252C%2Bnullable%253DTrue%252C%2Bindex%253DREDACTED%2B%2B%2B%2Bfinished_at%253A%2BMapped%255Bdatetime%2B%257C%2BNone%255D%2B%253D%2Bmapped_column%2528DateTime%2528timezone%253DREDACTED%252C%2Bnullable%253DREDACTED%2B%2B%2B%2Bdlq_published_at%253A%2BMapped%255Bdatetime%2B%257C%2BNone%255D%2B%253D%2Bmapped_column%2528DateTime%2528timezone%253DREDACTED%252C%2Bnullable%253DREDACTED%2B%2B%2B%2Bevents%253A%2BMapped%255Blist%255B%255C%2522JobEvent%255C%2522%255D%255D%2B%253D%2Brelationship%2528back_populates%253DREDACTED%2522job%255C%2522%252C%2Bcascade%253DREDACTED%2522all%252C%2Bdelete-orphan%255C%2522%2529%255Cn%255Cn%255Cnclass%2BJobEvent%2528Base%2529%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B__tablename__%2B%253D%2B%255C%2522job_events%255C%2522%255Cn%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bid%253A%2BMapped%255Bint%255D%2B%253D%2Bmapped_column%2528Integer%252C%2Bprimary_key%253DTrue%252C%2Bautoincrement%253DREDACTED%2B%2B%2B%2Bjob_id%253A%2BMapped%255Bstr%255D%2B%253D%2Bmapped_column%2528ForeignKey%2528%255C%2522jobs.id%255C%2522%252C%2Bondelete%253DREDACTED%2522CASCADE%255C%2522%2529%252C%2Bindex%253DREDACTED%2B%2B%2B%2Bts%253A%2BMapped%255Bdatetime%255D%2B%253D%2Bmapped_column%2528DateTime%2528timezone%253DREDACTED%252C%2Bdefault%253DREDACTED%252C%2Bnullable%253DFalse%252C%2Bindex%253DREDACTED%2B%2B%2B%2Bold_state%253A%2BMapped%255Bstr%2B%257C%2BNone%255D%2B%253D%2Bmapped_column%2528String%252816%2529%252C%2Bnullable%253DREDACTED%2B%2B%2B%2Bnew_state%253A%2BMapped%255Bstr%2B%257C%2BNone%255D%2B%253D%2Bmapped_column%2528String%252816%2529%252C%2Bnullable%253DREDACTED%2B%2B%2B%2Bmessage%253A%2BMapped%255Bstr%255D%2B%253D%2Bmapped_column%2528Text%252C%2Bnullable%253DREDACTED%2B%2B%2B%2Bmetadata%253A%2BMapped%255Bdict%255Bstr%252C%2BAny%255D%2B%257C%2BNone%255D%2B%253D%2Bmapped_column%2528JSON%252C%2Bnullable%253DREDACTED%2B%2B%2B%2Bjob%253A%2BMapped%255BJob%255D%2B%253D%2Brelationship%2528back_populates%253DREDACTED%2522events%255C%2522%2529%255Cn%255Cn%255Cnclass%2BScheduleTick%2528Base%2529%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B__tablename__%2B%253D%2B%255C%2522schedule_ticks%255C%2522%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B__table_args__%2B%253D%2B%2528UniqueConstraint%2528%255C%2522schedule_id%255C%2522%252C%2B%255C%2522planned_time%255C%2522%252C%2Bname%253DREDACTED%2522uq_schedule_tick%255C%2522%2529%252C%2529%255Cn%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bid%253A%2BMapped%255Bint%255D%2B%253D%2Bmapped_column%2528Integer%252C%2Bprimary_key%253DTrue%252C%2Bautoincrement%253DREDACTED%2B%2B%2B%2Bschedule_id%253A%2BMapped%255Bstr%255D%2B%253D%2Bmapped_column%2528String%2528255%2529%252C%2Bnullable%253DFalse%252C%2Bindex%253DREDACTED%2B%2B%2B%2Bplanned_time%253A%2BMapped%255Bdatetime%255D%2B%253D%2Bmapped_column%2528DateTime%2528timezone%253DREDACTED%252C%2Bnullable%253DFalse%252C%2Bindex%253DREDACTED%2B%2B%2B%2Bjob_id%253A%2BMapped%255Bstr%2B%257C%2BNone%255D%2B%253D%2Bmapped_column%2528String%252836%2529%252C%2BForeignKey%2528%255C%2522jobs.id%255C%2522%252C%2Bondelete%253DREDACTED%2522SET%2BNULL%255C%2522%2529%252C%2Bnullable%253DREDACTED%2B%2B%2B%2Bcreated_at%253A%2BMapped%255Bdatetime%255D%2B%253D%2Bmapped_column%2528DateTime%2528timezone%253DREDACTED%252C%2Bdefault%253DREDACTED
